title: elaeocarpaceae
intro: The elaeocarpaceae rank is a botanical family of flowering plants. Elaeocarpaceae is a diverse family, comprising approximately 250 species, primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. Members of this family are often characterized by their showy flowers and edible fruits, such as the genus Elaeocarpus, which is native to Australia and Asia. The elaeocarpaceae family is part of the order Oxalidales and is often associated with the families Cunoniaceae and Brunelliaceae in terms of shared characteristics and evolutionary relationships.
